name: blueprint-tdd-family

describe.confidence_note: Clear triage, rich vault context, well-defined steps

specify.confidence_note: Strong spec grounded in experiment data. Open-ended items (family assessment improvements) carry some uncertainty until challenged.

challenge.confidence_note: Family round 1 CONVERGED. 6 spec changes adopted. 1 false positive discarded. Elder validated all changes with vault evidence.

edge_cases.confidence_note: 18 boundaries mapped. 5 spec changes adopted (timeout, file conflict, coupling, boolean type, resume). All validated by vault analogies.

premortem.skip_reason: Markdown-only change with no operational surface. Rollback is git revert. No deployment, database, or API.

review.skip_reason: Family debate was thorough (10+ agents, 3 revisions). External review would likely repeat findings.

test.confidence_note: 38 spec-blind assertions across 6 categories. Heavy grep-based verification suitable for markdown toolkit.

archive_reason: Closed. Family mode deprecated (now maps to critique per CLAUDE.md).
